title: Miconia linneoides
taxonomy: Miconia linneoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Miconia, which consists of over 1,000 species of plants. The family Melastomataceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "memorial flowers." This family is native to tropical regions of the world, including Central and South America, Africa, and Asia. Miconia linneoides is a tropical plant that is likely to be found in its native habitats with similar characteristics to the other species of its genus.
